registry_refs.notes: W&L rank 174; registry id 385; requested host now redirects.

publication_scope.notes: The publication announces a rename to Insurance Law Review beginning with Volume 32.

evidence.notes: Legacy host redirected through HTTP to production.wordpress.uconn.edu/lawcilj/robots.txt, which returned a WordPress 404 page; robots decision remains unknown.

Requested cilj.law.uconn.edu redirected to this canonical WordPress subdirectory. Page announces rename to Insurance Law Review beginning Volume 32 but its Latest Issue area contains no issue/article links.
Archive page h1 is present, but .entry-content and four SiteOrigin custom HTML widgets are empty; no issue, article, or PDF links are rendered.

reconnaissance.notes: Migration/rename is live, but publication holdings content was not carried into the visible archive route.

include: Connecticut Insurance Law Journal and successor Insurance Law Review print issues
scope.notes: Treat both titles as one continuity only after Volume 32 transition metadata is confirmed.

layout_eras.label: Legacy host redirect to UConn production WordPress
layout_eras.notes: The latest visible news is 2024 and archive content is missing.

layout_eras.label: Insurance Law Review rename
layout_eras.notes: Homepage says transition begins Volume 32; no issue route exposed.

sources.notes: Transition statement only, not an article record.

validation.notes: No file link was exposed; no download attempted.

robots.notes: Redirected robots route ended in WordPress 404.

barriers.notes: Legacy host migrated to a UConn production WordPress subdirectory whose archive is empty.
Archive returns 200 but has no holdings records.

access.politeness_notes: Robots first; one redirected homepage and one archive request; no file downloads.

verdict.summary: The legacy CILJ host redirects to a renamed Insurance Law Review WordPress site, but its Latest Issue and Archive content are empty and no article or PDF routes are exposed.
blockers: No article metadata or file path
Canonical production.wordpress.uconn.edu host is not mapped
verdict.next_action: Ask the journal or UConn library for the post-migration archive location and repair the canonical archive before adapter work.
verdict.implementation_notes: Replace the legacy host seed with /lawcilj/archive/ only after it contains records; preserve the title transition at Volume 32.
